audience: SMEs, website administrators and marketing teams responsible for a WordPress website
primaryDutchSearchIntent: Een uitvoerbare onderhoudsplanning geven voor WordPress-websites van zelfstandigen en KMO's

searchIntent.question: What should an SME check weekly, monthly, quarterly and annually to maintain a WordPress website?

directAnswer: WordPress maintenance should cover more than updates. Check forms, backups and alerts weekly; update software, permissions, speed and links monthly; test restores, licences, SEO, content and integrations quarterly; and review the wider technical setup every year.
title: WordPress maintenance checklist for a safe and fast SME website
metaDescription: Use this WordPress maintenance checklist for weekly, monthly, quarterly and annual checks of updates, backups, security, speed, forms and technical SEO.
factsToPreserve: A successful backup result is not a substitute for a restore test
Larger updates and online shops may warrant a staging environment
Unused plugins and themes should be removed carefully after a backup
Technical maintenance includes forms, integrations, performance and SEO
Responsibilities and response expectations should be documented
